questions.question: State the basic principle of ANOVA and explain its purpose in a research study. (Show all working) (15 marks)
Compare the difference between One-way ANOVA and Two-way ANOVA in terms of their application and statistical analysis. (Show all working) (15 marks)

A researcher is conducting a Latin-square design experiment to investigate the effect of three different levels of a factor on the mean response of a dependent variable. The experiment involves four treatment and four replication. Calculate the expected sum of squares between groups (SSB) and the expected sum of squares within groups (SSW). (Show all working) (10 marks)
